html:
A Bunny Puff can be obtained by killing a Bunnyman or by deconstructing a Rabbit Hutch underground with a Hammer or Deconstruction Staff. Bunny Puffs are not dropped by Rabbits.

Bunny Puffs are used to create the Fur Roll and the Rabbit Hutch. They can also be traded to the Pig King for two Gold Nuggets each and fed to Pigs to befriend them. Bunny Puffs are classified as Horrible meat, which means Pigs, Hounds, and Spiders have no complaints about eating left behind Bunny Puffs on the ground.

Usage

×2

×2

×4

×10

×4

Trivia

  • Although Bunnymen will attempt to kill a Survivor for holding any sort of meats, they don't seem to care much about why someone would be holding their puffy tail.

Gallery

  • A Spider eating a Bunny Puff off the ground.
  • A Pig eating a Bunny Puff off the ground.

Bunny Puffs are used to create the Fur Roll and the Rabbit Hutch. They can also be traded to the Pig King for two Gold Nuggets each and fed to Pigs to befriend them. Bunny Puffs are classified as Horrible meat, which means Pigs, Hounds, and Spiders have no complaints about eating left behind Bunny Puffs on the ground.

A '''Bunny Puff''' can be obtained by killing a [[Bunnyman]] or by deconstructing a [[Rabbit Hutch]] [[Caves|underground]] with a [[Hammer]] or [[Deconstruction Staff]]. Bunny Puffs are not dropped by [[Rabbit]]s.

Bunny Puffs are used to create the [[Fur Roll]] and the Rabbit Hutch. They can also be traded to the [[Pig King]] for two [[Gold Nugget]]s each and fed to [[Pig]]s to befriend them. Bunny Puffs are classified as [[Horrible]] meat, which means Pigs, [[Hound]]s, and [[Spider]]s have no complaints about eating left behind Bunny Puffs on the ground.

|result = Rabbit Hutch}}

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Although Bunnymen will attempt to kill a Survivor for holding any sort of [[meats]], they don't seem to care much about why someone would be holding their puffy tail.
